Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shyrax the Third]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Shyrax the Third is the rightful Queen of the planet Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — Shyrax the Third is a nine-foot-tall Karoshan and the rightful Queen of Karosha.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — Shyrax the Third is an exiled Karoshan Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — Shyrax the Third is a nine-foot-tall Karoshan woman with leathery yellow skin and bronze eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Shyrax the Third is the exiled Karoshan queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Shyrax the Third wears a diadem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — Shyrax the Third is the rightful Queen of Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — Shyrax the Third has yellow arms and wears elaborate armor shimmering with enchantments.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
